opportunities.rationale: Energy vs airlines in war/stagflation regime. CVX close ~$211.15 on Mar 27 (comfortably above $194 long stop). ALK close ~$34.94 on Mar 31, high $35.49 (well below $40.50 short stop). QG3 pass on both legs confirmed. ALK has the highest unhedged fuel cost exposure among US carriers. Spread +9.2% target, -3% spread stop. Manual chart check recommended for CVX on the 3-5 days immediately post-entry to confirm no intraday dip below $194. Invalidation: confirmed ceasefire and WTI back below low-$80s.
data_sources: oilprice.com sustained high WTI late March 2026

opportunities.rationale: Sector rotation: energy outperforms while S&P labours below key MAs. XOM close $173.32 on Mar 31 (above $153 stop). SPY close ~$648.80 on Mar 31; highs since Mar 22 max $660.89 on Mar 25 (below $675 short stop). QG3 pass both legs. Spread profitable but not at target. Oil above $95 is the key regime condition. Invalidation: ceasefire + oil below $85 or strong FOMC pivot lifting SPY. Spread stop at -3%.

GLP-1 quality vs reset. LLY close ~$886.63 on Mar 30 (above $878 long stop; lows in Mar 23-30 stayed above $877). NVO close ~$35.29 on Mar 30 (below $40 short stop; highs in week of Mar 16-30 peaked ~$39.27). QG3 pass both legs. Spread not yet at target. Invalidation: LLY breaks below $878 or NVO delivers decisive positive Cagrisema update. Spread stop at -3%.

Defensive quality vs reset in staples. COST close ~$996.58 on Mar 30 (above $945 stop; lows in Mar 23-30 stayed above $964). WMT close ~$123.34 on Mar 30 (below $127 short stop; highs in Mar 24-30 never breached $127). QG3 pass both legs. Spread modestly in COST's favour; not yet at target. Invalidation: WMT demonstrates clear margin expansion or COST membership slowdown. Spread stop at -3%.
